Hi Chloe,

We saw a sharp increase in authorization latency t...
text:
From: Novagrid Ops <ops@novagrid.com>
To: Chloe Martin <chloe.martin@redwood.com>
Cc: sre-lead@novagrid.com, accounts@novagrid.com
Date: Sun, 02 Nov 2025 09:12:00 -0700
Subject: Spike in authorization latency affecting checkout — observed 09:00–09:23 PST

Hi Chloe,

We saw a sharp increase in authorization latency this morning that impacted our checkout traffic between 09:00 and 09:23 PST. During that window we observed ~18% 5xx responses and elevated 500/504 rates for auth checks; latency p50 jumped from ~45ms to ~2.2s and p95 to ~5.8s. That caused retries on our side and a measurable drop in conversion for affected customers.

We've attached a small log bundle (novagrid_log_bundle_20251102.zip) containing request IDs, timestamps, and example headers. Can you confirm whether this maps to any service-side outage or throttling on Redwood's side? We need to understand SLA credit eligibi...

- Timeline (proposed): kickoff week of Aug 4 -> 3-week evaluation window -> decision week of Aug 25
- Success criteria (exit gates):
 - Functional coverage: target >= 90% on the agreed intent set
 - Quality: agreement (intent-match) >= 95% on the evaluation set
 - Safety: hallucination rate < 2% measured against our sample queries
 - Performance: 99th-pct latency <= 300ms for typical 256-token requests
 - Reliabilit...

text:
From: Alex Turner <alex.turner@signalsuite.io>
To: Camila Reyes <camila@redwood.com>
Date: Tue, 14 Jul 2025 09:12:00 -0700
Subject: Exploring a possible replacement: ModelWave -> Redwood (pricing + pilot)

Hi Camila,

Quick note — we are evaluating a potential switch off ModelWave for our inference needs. We run a mix of long chat sessions (avg 700 tokens) and embedding-heavy batch jobs; current spend is roughly $110k/mo and ModelWave is offering a multi-year sticker that isn’t aligning with our burst/surge profile.

Two asks up front:
- Can you share packaging options that map to sustained commit vs bursty traffic?
- Would Redwood consider a constrained pilot (3 months) with migration credits to offset egress and implementation risk?

Attached is an excerpt of our current contract (ModelWave_contract_excerpt.pdf) — procurement wants a comparable commercial structure before we proceed...

text:
From: Samira Patel <samira.patel@lumenworks.com>
To: Alex Martinez <alex.martinez@redwood.com>
Cc: procurement@lumenworks.com
Date: Mon, 14 Jul 2025 09:12:00 -0700
Subject: Production impact—queueing spike, request for short-term credit/behavior change

Hi Alex,

We saw a significant increase in tail latency and queuing on our reserved pool during yesterday's batch of customer requests (roughly 18:10–18:40 PDT). Several API calls retried which impacted UX for a portion of our customers.

We understand bursts happen, but our contract references a dedicated throughput target and queueing behavior that should minimize this. Could Redwood help with two things?

1) A short-term credit for the token overage incurred during the incident window (rough estimate attached).
2) A quick rundown of what caused the queuing behavior and whether a temporary priority carveout or headroom change is poss...
